title: God Weapons
description: Added a mod that introduces an overpowered axe, sword, and new ore material
body:
# **God Mod**

[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/XjHxut3v?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/mod/XjHxut3v)
[![GitHub Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/URGG/God-Weapons-MCmod?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/URGG/God-Weapons-MCmod)
[![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/XjHxut3v?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/mod/XjHxut3v)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/URGG/God-Weapons-MCmod?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/URGG/God-Weapons-MCmod/blob/main/LICENSE)

**🔗 [Source Code & Issues](https://github.com/URGG/God-Weapons-MCmod) | 📥 [Download Latest](https://modrinth.com/mod/XjHxut3v) | ⭐ Star us on GitHub!**

---

Ascend to divine power with **God Mod** - a **100% server-side compatible** Minecraft mod for **Fabric** that adds legendary weapons and boss battles to your world. Wield the power of gods with weapons that surpass all others!

## **What does it add?**
God Mod introduces **overpowered weapons** and **epic boss encounters** designed for players who want to experience ultimate power in Minecraft.

## **Legendary Weapons**
* **God Sword** - Deals 2000 damage with fiery particle effects and epic sound design
* **God Axe** - Deals 2100 damage in melee, or throw it like Kratos' axe and watch it return automatically!

## **Epic Boss Battles**
* **God Boss** - A challenging boss entity with custom AI and abilities

## **Key Features**

### **🔥 Insane Damage Numbers**
* God Sword: 2000 damage per hit
* God Axe: 2100 melee damage, 1500 thrown damage
* One-shot almost any vanilla mob!

### **✨ Visual Effects**
* Fire particles and smoke trails for the God Sword
* Purple witch and portal particles for the God Axe
* Particle trails when throwing the axe

### **🔊 Audio Design**
* Custom sound effects for each weapon
* Mystical enchanting sounds and ominous wither sounds
* Satisfying audio feedback for all actions

### **⚡ Kratos-Style Axe Throwing**
* Right-click to throw your God Axe
* Automatically returns to you after hitting targets
* Homing behavior ensures it finds its way back
* Deals damage on both throw and return

## **Crafting**
Craft these legendary weapons using **Magic Crystals** and **God Material** - the most powerful crafting material in the game with:
* 2000 durability
* 12.0 mining speed
* 22 enchantability
* Netherite-level strength

## **Boss Battles** *(adding soon)*
Face off against the **God Boss** - a formidable enemy designed to challenge even players wielding god-tier weapons. Are you worthy of divine power?

## **Compatibility**
**Minecraft: Java Edition**
* 1.21.4 -- working on updating code to current version

**Platforms**
* Fabric

**Supported environments**
* Client and Server

**Requirements**
* Fabric API

## **Performance**
God Mod is lightweight and optimized:
* Efficient particle systems that don't lag your game
* Smart entity management for throwable weapons
* Server-friendly boss AI

## **FAQ**
**Q: Are these weapons too overpowered?**
**A:** That's the point! God Mod is designed for players who want to experience ultimate power and epic boss battles.

**Q: Can I use this in multiplayer?**
**A:** Yes! God Mod works perfectly on servers with all players having the mod installed.

**Q: Does the axe really come back like Kratos' axe?**
**A:** Absolutely! Right-click to throw it, and it will automatically return to you with homing behavior and epic particle effects.

**Q: Can I customize the damage values?**
**A:** Currently the values are hardcoded, but future versions may include configuration options.

---

**Found a bug or have a suggestion?** [Open an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/URGG/God-Weapons-MCmod/issues) or contribute to the project!

**Enjoying the mod?** Consider giving us a ⭐ on [GitHub](https://github.com/URGG/God-Weapons-MCmod) to show your support!
